justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot 2.1 to 3.3 and Java 8 to 21, migrating javax.* to jakarta.* and updating the MySQL connector artifact. However, it introduces unnecessary churn by adding explicit jakarta.* dependencies that are already managed by Spring Boot 3 starters, and it removes the @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) annotation without adding @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) (though Spring Boot 3 auto-detects JUnit 5, the test class remains public without @Test imports from JUnit 5 properly structured). The migration of @RequestMapping to specific annotations is good, but the diff lacks Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching) and has minor coherence issues with redundant dependency declarations.
